MASTER CALENDAR COURT

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-16-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RYAN L. DAHM OF COOK COLLECTION ATTORNEYS, TEL. NO. 989-4730 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR BY THE MOVING PARTY. NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2014 Set For Trial On Sep-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment; Application For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment After Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY INC.'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment; Application For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment After Hearing is off calendar as untimely pursuant to CCP 484.040 and 1005(b). The Application was served with the Summons and Complaint by substitute service on January 17, 2014. (Proof of Service, filed Jan. 28, 2014, 5b.) Thereafter, the process server mailed the documents on January 21, 2014. (Id. at 5b(4).) Substitute service is deemed complete on the 10th day after mailing. (CCP 415.20(a).) Plaintiff Birite Restaurant Supply, Inc. did not provide 16 court days notice. (CCP 484.040, 1005(b).) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
